name: CaCl₂ Competent Cell Preparation

components.name: 1. 过夜培养 DH5α/BL21 → 1:100 接种至 50 mL LB
5. 弃上清，冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ 重悬
8. 冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ + 15% 甘油 重悬
9. 分装 100 µL/管，液氮速冻，-80°C 保存

nameCn: CaCl₂ 化学感受态细胞制备

notes.en: Keep everything on ice throughout! Typical efficiency: 10⁶–10⁷ CFU/µg. Overnight incubation at 4°C can improve efficiency. For higher efficiency (>10⁸), use the Inoue method (MnCl₂/CaCl₂).
notes.zh: 全程冰上操作！效率通常 10⁶–10⁷ CFU/µg。过夜 4°C 孵育可提高效率。如需更高效率 (>10⁸)，使用 Inoue 法 (MnCl₂/CaCl₂)。

ref: Hanahan (1983) J Mol Biol 166:557–580; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning

materials.name: E. coli cells (DH5α, TOP10, or similar)

usage.en: Prepare chemically competent E. coli cells using CaCl₂ method for heat-shock transformation.
usage.zh: CaCl₂ 化学法制备大肠杆菌感受态细胞，用于热激转化。

briefSteps.en: Grow E. coli to OD₆₀₀ 0.3–0.5 → chill on ice → pellet → resuspend in ice-cold 100 mM CaCl₂ → incubate on ice 30 min → pellet → resuspend in CaCl₂ + 15% glycerol → aliquot → freeze at −80°C
briefSteps.zh: E. coli 培养至 OD₆₀₀ 0.3–0.5 → 冰浴 → 离心 → 冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ 重悬 → 冰浴 30 min → 离心 → CaCl₂ + 15% 甘油重悬 → 分装 → −80°C 冻存

detailedSteps.en: Inoculate 1 mL of overnight E. coli culture into 50 mL LB (1:50 dilution) in a 250 mL flask; shake at 37°C, 225 rpm until OD₆₀₀ reaches 0.3–0.5 (approximately 1.5–2 h). Monitor OD every 20 min.
detailedSteps.zh: 将 1 mL E. coli 过夜培养物接种至 250 mL 摇瓶中的 50 mL LB（1:50），37°C、225 rpm 振荡至 OD₆₀₀ = 0.3–0.5（约 1.5–2 h），每 20 min 监测一次 OD。

detailedSteps.en: Transfer the culture to a 50 mL pre-chilled centrifuge tube; place on ice for 15 min. Keep all subsequent steps on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 将菌液转移至预冷的 50 mL 离心管，冰浴 15 min。此后所有步骤均在冰上进行。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 3,000×g for 10 min at 4°C; carefully discard supernatant by decanting. Keep tube on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、3,000×g 离心 10 min，倾倒弃去上清，管子保持在冰上。

detailedSteps.en: Gently resuspend the pellet in 25 mL ice-cold 100 mM CaCl₂ (sterile); pipette slowly without introducing bubbles.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 25 mL 冰冷无菌 100 mM CaCl₂ 缓慢重悬菌体，轻柔吹打避免产生气泡。

detailedSteps.en: Incubate on ice for 30 min with occasional gentle swirling.
detailedSteps.zh: 冰浴孵育 30 min，期间偶尔轻轻摇动。

detailedSteps.en: Centrifuge at 3,000×g for 10 min at 4°C; carefully discard supernatant.
detailedSteps.zh: 4°C、3,000×g 离心 10 min，小心弃去上清。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend the pellet in 2.5 mL of ice-cold 100 mM CaCl₂ + 15% glycerol by gentle pipetting. Final volume should be approximately 1/20th of original culture volume.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 2.5 mL 冰冷 100 mM CaCl₂ + 15% 甘油轻柔重悬菌体，终体积约为原培养体积的 1/20。

detailedSteps.en: Optional: incubate the cell suspension at 4°C overnight (12–16 h) to further improve transformation efficiency.
detailedSteps.zh: 可选：将细胞悬液 4°C 孵育过夜（12–16 h）以进一步提高转化效率。

detailedSteps.en: Aliquot 100 µL per pre-chilled 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tube; snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at −80°C. Cells are stable for 6 months.
detailedSteps.zh: 每管分装 100 µL 至预冷的 1.5 mL 离心管，液氮速冻后 −80°C 保存，可稳定保存 6 个月。

note.en: Competent cells aliquoted and frozen at −80°C can be stored for up to 6 months.
note.zh: 分装并 −80°C 冻存的感受态细胞可保存最多 6 个月。
